item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Namun, saya juga mengakui bahwa hak individu perlu dilindungi, tetapi tidak selalu harus bertentangan sepenuhnya dengan kepentingan kolektif.

notes: Agent A begins clearly pro-society but softens into a rights-within-collective-balance position while still rejecting Agent B's rights-first frame. Agent B stays consistently rights-first, with bounded acknowledgement of community well-being through dialogue rather than coercion. Agent B's final opening sentence is awkwardly phrased, but the rest of the final turn remains clearly opposed to sacrificing individual liberties for social stability.
